programme.title: Monstert Of Er Long Lake
programme.desc: Yu Huan wants to marry his childhood sweetheart Xiao Yu but is stopped by a huge bride price. With three goofy friends, he tries to raise money but accidentally awakens a century-old lake monster.

programme.title: Red Land
programme.desc: Humans battle underground mutants "Headhunters" and the "Cave Tribe," fighting to survive and reclaim their home on the dangerous, resource-scarce surface.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep35
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep36
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: City of the City Ep13
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.title: City of the City Ep14
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep20
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep21
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep22
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep09
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep10
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: Live Up To Your Youth Ep02
programme.desc: A group of youngsters arrives in Beijing, chasing careers in writing & music. Living in a cramped basement, they face real-life struggles in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: Live Up To Your Youth Ep03
programme.desc: A group of youngsters arrives in Beijing, chasing careers in writing & music. Living in a cramped basement, they face real-life struggles in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep07
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep08
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep23
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.
